moments.title: The Open Championship underway at Royal Birkdale
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, one of golf's four major tournaments, is being played from July 16-19, 2026, at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England.

angles.name: Golf action
angles.copy: The Open Championship is live from Royal Birkdale! Who are you backing to lift the Claret Jug this year? #TheOpen

angles.name: Weekend sport
angles.copy: It's moving day at The Open! Catch all the drama from Royal Birkdale as the world's best battle it out. Tune in now!

moments.title: BBC Proms 2026 kicks off its First Night
moments.blurb: The world's largest classical music festival, the BBC Proms, begins its 2026 season today, July 17, at the Royal Albert Hall in London, running until September 12.

angles.name: First Night excitement
angles.copy: It's the First Night of the Proms! The Royal Albert Hall is buzzing as the iconic classical music festival begins its 2026 season. Ready for some incredible performances!

angles.name: Classical summer
angles.copy: Your summer of classical music starts now! The BBC Proms is live from London, bringing world-class orchestras and musicians to your ears and screens.

moments.title: David Hasselhoff turns 74
moments.blurb: Actor and singer David Hasselhoff, known for 'Knight Rider' and 'Baywatch,' celebrates his 74th birthday today, July 17.

angles.name: The Hoff's birthday
angles.copy: Happy 74th birthday to the one and only David Hasselhoff! From K.I.T.T. to the beach, he's an icon. What's your favourite Hoff moment?

angles.name: Baywatch vibes
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 74th birthday to the legendary David Hasselhoff! Still running in slow motion in our hearts.

moments.title: McFly's Tom Fletcher is 40 today
moments.blurb: Singer, songwriter, and musician Tom Fletcher, best known as a member of the band McFly, celebrates his 40th birthday on July 17.

angles.name: McFly legend
angles.copy: Can you believe it? McFly's Tom Fletcher is 40 today! Still rocking out and making us feel all the nostalgia. Happy birthday, Tom!

angles.name: Pop-punk icon
angles.copy: Happy 40th to the super talented Tom Fletcher! From McFly to author, he truly does it all. Give him some birthday love!

moments.title: Kali Uchis turns 31
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning R&B and pop singer Kali Uchis celebrates her 31st birthday today, July 17.

angles.name: Modern R&B star
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to the incredible Kali Uchis, who turns 31 today! What's your favourite track from her?

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival wraps up
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival, held in Stornoway on the Isle of Lewis, concludes tomorrow, July 18, after four days of music and culture.

angles.name: Last day in the Hebrides
angles.copy: It's the final day of the Hebridean Celtic Festival tomorrow! If you're there, make the most of the last few hours of incredible music and island vibes. #HebCelt

moments.title: Splendour Festival's final ever year this weekend
moments.blurb: Nottingham's Splendour Festival returns to Wollaton Hall & Deer Park for its final ever event on July 18-19, 2026, promising a big send-off after 18 years.

angles.name: Nottingham's big goodbye
angles.copy: This weekend is it! Splendour Festival is happening for the very last time at Wollaton Hall. Who's heading down to give it the send-off it deserves?

angles.name: Festival farewell
angles.copy: Eighteen years of memories come to a close this weekend as Splendour Festival hosts its final event. What's your favourite Splendour memory?

moments.title: Queen's Brian May celebrates 79th birthday
moments.blurb: Legendary Queen guitarist and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday on Sunday, July 19.

angles.name: Rock royalty birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Dr. Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo from the legend?

angles.name: Queen's guitar hero
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Brian May, who turns 79 on Sunday! A true rock god and a brilliant mind. Send him your birthday wishes!

moments.title: Fred again.. is 33 on Sunday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning DJ and producer Fred again.., known for his electrifying live sets and collaborations, turns 33 on Sunday, July 19.

angles.name: Dance music star
angles.copy: Big birthday shout out to the phenomenal Fred again.. turning 33 on Sunday! What's the track that got you hooked?

moments.title: Gabrielle turns 56
moments.blurb: British singer-songwriter Gabrielle, known for hits like 'Dreams' and 'Rise,' celebrates her 56th birthday on Sunday, July 19.

angles.name: 90s icon
angles.copy: Happy 56th birthday to the soulful voice of Gabrielle! Still got 'Dreams' playing on repeat. What's your favourite Gabrielle song?

moments.title: Cat Stevens / Yusuf Islam is 78
moments.blurb: Influential British singer-songwriter Cat Stevens, also known as Yusuf Islam, celebrates his 78th birthday on Tuesday, July 21.

angles.name: Folk legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 78th birthday to the incredible Cat Stevens / Yusuf Islam! His songs are timeless. What's your go-to track?

moments.title: Paloma Faith celebrates 44th birthday
moments.blurb: Award-winning British singer Paloma Faith, known for her distinctive voice and retro style, turns 44 on Tuesday, July 21.

angles.name: Pop powerhouse
angles.copy: Happy 44th birthday to the fabulous Paloma Faith! Always bringing her unique flair to the music scene. Celebrate with her biggest hits!

moments.title: Latitude Festival kicks off next week
moments.blurb: The Latitude Festival, a multi-arts festival featuring music, comedy, and more, takes place at Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23-26, 2026.

angles.name: Suffolk festival vibes
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is just around the corner! Get ready for a weekend of music, arts, and good times at Henham Park. Who's got their tickets?

angles.name: Festival anticipation
angles.copy: Counting down the days to Latitude! The lineup looks incredible, and we can't wait to see what surprises are in store this year. #Latitude

moments.title: Selena Gomez turns 33
moments.blurb: Actress and pop superstar Selena Gomez celebrates her 33rd birthday on Wednesday, July 22.

angles.name: Pop princess birthday
angles.copy: Happy 33rd birthday to the amazing Selena Gomez! From Disney darling to global pop icon, she's done it all. What's your favourite Selena era?

moments.title: Eagles' Don Henley is 78
moments.blurb: Co-founder, drummer, and vocalist of the Eagles, Don Henley, celebrates his 78th birthday on Wednesday, July 22.

angles.name: Rock legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 78th birthday to the legendary Don Henley of the Eagles! A voice and a talent that defined an era. #DonHenley

moments.title: Love Island UK 2026 finale next Monday
moments.blurb: The grand finale of Love Island UK series 13 is set to air on Monday, July 27, bringing another season of villa drama to a close.

angles.name: Love Island countdown
angles.copy: The countdown is ON! The Love Island UK finale is just days away on Monday 27th July. Who do you think will be crowned the winners?

angles.name: Final week vibes
angles.copy: It's the final week in the Love Island villa! Get ready for all the last-minute drama, declarations, and inevitable tears before the big finale on Monday.

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday on Thursday, July 24.

angles.name: J.Lo's big day
angles.copy: Happy 57th birthday to the one and only J.Lo! The queen of pop, dance, and everything fabulous. What's your favourite J.Lo hit?

angles.name: Dance floor diva
angles.copy: Celebrating Jennifer Lopez's 57th birthday on Thursday! She still brings the heat to every stage. Get your dance on with her greatest tracks.

moments.title: Premier League 2026/27 season dates confirmed
moments.blurb: The Premier League has confirmed that the 2026/27 season will begin on August 21 or 22, 2026, and conclude on May 30, 2027, following the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

angles.name: Football's back soon
angles.copy: The wait is almost over! The Premier League 2026/27 season officially kicks off on August 21st/22nd. Who are you backing for the title?

angles.name: New season anticipation
angles.copy: Mark your calendars! The Premier League fixtures are out and the new season is just weeks away. Time to start planning those matchday weekends!
